methods.name: get_hook_type_from_angle
methods.signature: get_hook_type_from_angle( hook_type: HookType | int, hook_angle: float ) -> HookType
methods.summary: Determines the hook type based on the given angle
methods.remarks: Determines the hook type based on the given angle

params.name: hook_type
params.doc: Type of the hook. If set to -1, hook type is determined based on given angle. Otherwise, given hook type is returned.

params.name: hook_angle
params.doc: Hook angle

methods.name: create_longitudinal_shape_with_hooks
methods.signature: create_longitudinal_shape_with_hooks( length: float, model_angles: RotationAngles, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, concrete_cover_props: ConcreteCoverProperties, start_hook: float = 0, end_hook: float = 0, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create a straight bar shape, optionally with standard 90° hooks at start and/or end. The shape is created in the XY coordinate system, along X axis.
methods.remarks: Create a straight bar shape, optionally with standard 90° hooks at start and/or end. The shape is created in the XY coordinate system, along X axis.

params.name: length
params.doc: Length of the reference line.

params.name: model_angles
params.doc: Angles to rotate the shape from local to global coordinate system

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties

params.name: concrete_cover_props
params.doc: Concrete covers. Relevant are: left, right and bottom cover

params.name: start_hook
params.doc: Hook length at the start. Default value (0) calculates the length automatically. If set to -1: no hook.

params.name: end_hook
params.doc: Hook length at the end. Default value (0) calculates the length automatically. If set to -1: no hook.

methods.name: create_longitudinal_shape_with_user_hooks
methods.signature: create_longitudinal_shape_with_user_hooks( length: float, model_angles: RotationAngles, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, concrete_cover_props: ConcreteCoverProperties, start_hook: float = 0.0, end_hook: float = 0.0, start_hook_angle: float = 90.0, end_hook_angle: float = 90.0, hook_type_start: HookType | int = -1, hook_type_end: HookType | int = -1, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create a straight bar shape, optionally with user defined hooks at start and/or end. The shape is created in the local XY coordinate system, along X axis.
methods.remarks: Create a straight bar shape, optionally with user defined hooks at start and/or end. The shape is created in the local XY coordinate system, along X axis.

params.name: length
params.doc: Length of the reference line.

params.name: model_angles
params.doc: Angles to rotate the shape from local to global coordinate system

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties

params.name: concrete_cover_props
params.doc: Concrete covers. Relevant are: left, right and bottom cover

params.name: start_hook
params.doc: Hook length at the start. Default value (0) calculates the length automatically. If set to -1: no hook.

params.name: end_hook
params.doc: Hook length at the end. Default value (0) calculates the length automatically. If set to -1: no hook.

params.name: start_hook_angle
params.doc: Hook angle at start. Value between [-180, 180]

params.name: end_hook_angle
params.doc: Hook angle at end. Value between [-180, 180]

params.name: hook_type_start
params.doc: Type of the hook at the start. By default determined based on angle.

params.name: hook_type_end
params.doc: Type of the hook at the end. By default determined based on angle.

methods.name: create_longitudinal_shape_with_anchorage
methods.signature: create_longitudinal_shape_with_anchorage( from_point: Point2D | Point3D, to_point: Point2D | Point3D, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, concrete_cover_props: ConcreteCoverProperties, start_anchorage: float = 0, end_anchorage: float = 0, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create a straight bar shape, optionally with anchorage. The shape is created in the local XY coordinate system, along X axis.
methods.remarks: Create a straight bar shape, optionally with anchorage. The shape is created in the local XY coordinate system, along X axis.

params.name: from_point
params.doc: Start point of the reference line.

params.name: to_point
params.doc: End point of the reference line.

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties.

params.name: concrete_cover_props
params.doc: Concrete covers. Relevant are: bottom cover. If the anchorage length at start or end is set to 0, then also left or right cover respectively are considered.

params.name: start_anchorage
params.doc: Anchorage length at the start.

params.name: end_anchorage
params.doc: Anchorage length at the end.

methods.name: create_l_shape_with_hooks
methods.signature: create_l_shape_with_hooks( length: float, width: float, model_angles: RotationAngles, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, concrete_cover_props: ConcreteCoverProperties, start_hook: float = 0, end_hook: float = 0, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create an L-shape, optionally with standard 90° hooks at start and/or end. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system like this: ⅃
methods.remarks: Create an L-shape, optionally with standard 90° hooks at start and/or end. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system like this: ⅃

params.name: length
params.doc: Length of the reference line parallel to X axis

params.name: width
params.doc: Length of the reference line parallel to Y axis

params.name: model_angles
params.doc: Angles to rotate the shape from local to global coordinate system

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties

params.name: concrete_cover_props
params.doc: Concrete cover properties. Relevant are all: bottom, left, right and top.

params.name: start_hook
params.doc: Hook length at the start. Default value (0) calculates the length automatically. If set to -1: no hook.

params.name: end_hook
params.doc: Hook length at the end. Default value (0) calculates the length automatically. If set to -1: no hook.

methods.name: create_stirrup
methods.signature: create_stirrup( length: float, width: float, model_angles: RotationAngles, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, concrete_cover_props: ConcreteCoverProperties, stirrup_type: StirrupType = Normal, hook_length: float = 0, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create a rectangular stirrup shape with default hooks. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system.
methods.remarks: Create a rectangular stirrup shape with default hooks. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system.

params.name: length
params.doc: Length of the reference rectangle (X-direction).

params.name: width
params.doc: Width of the reference rectangle (Y-direction).

params.name: model_angles
params.doc: Angles to rotate the shape from local to global coordinate system.

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties.

params.name: concrete_cover_props
params.doc: Concrete covers: bottom, left, right and top.

params.name: stirrup_type
params.doc: Type of the stirrup.

params.name: hook_length
params.doc: Hook length. Default value (0) calculates the length automatically.

methods.name: create_stirrup_with_user_hooks
methods.signature: create_stirrup_with_user_hooks( length: float, width: float, model_angles: RotationAngles, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, concrete_cover_props: ConcreteCoverProperties, stirrup_type: StirrupType, hook_length_start: float, hook_angle_start: float, hook_length_end: float, hook_angle_end: float, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create a rectangular stirrup shape with user defined hooks. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system.
methods.remarks: Create a rectangular stirrup shape with user defined hooks. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system.

params.name: length
params.doc: Length of the reference rectangle (X-direction).

params.name: width
params.doc: Width of the reference rectangle (Y-direction).

params.name: model_angles
params.doc: Angles to rotate the shape from local to global coordinate system.

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties.

params.name: concrete_cover_props
params.doc: Concrete covers: bottom, left, right and top.

params.name: stirrup_type
params.doc: Type of the stirrup.

params.name: hook_length_start
params.doc: Hook length at start. When set to 0, the length is calculated automatically.

params.name: hook_angle_start
params.doc: Hook angle at start. When set to 0, the angle is calculated automatically based on stirrup type.

params.name: hook_length_end
params.doc: Hook length at end. When set to 0, the length is calculated automatically.

params.name: hook_angle_end
params.doc: Hook angle at end. When set to 0, the angle is calculated automatically based on stirrup type.

methods.name: create_open_stirrup
methods.signature: create_open_stirrup( length: float, width: float, model_angles: RotationAngles, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, concrete_cover_props: ConcreteCoverProperties, start_hook: float = 0, end_hook: float = 0, start_hook_angle: float = 90.0, end_hook_angle: float = 90.0, hook_type: HookType | int = -1, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create a rectangular stirrup shape, open on the top side. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system.
methods.remarks: Create a rectangular stirrup shape, open on the top side. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system.

params.name: length
params.doc: Length of the reference rectangle (X-direction).

params.name: width
params.doc: Width of the reference rectangle (Y-direction).

params.name: model_angles
params.doc: Angles to rotate the shape from local to global coordinate system.

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties.

params.name: concrete_cover_props
params.doc: Concrete covers: bottom, left, right and top.

params.name: start_hook
params.doc: Length of the left hook. Default value (0) calculates the length automatically. If set to -1: no hook.

params.name: end_hook
params.doc: Length of the right hook. Default value (0) calculates the length automatically. If set to -1: no hook.

params.name: start_hook_angle
params.doc: Angle of the left hook [-180, 180]

params.name: end_hook_angle
params.doc: Angle of the right hook [-180, 180]

params.name: hook_type
params.doc: Type of the hook at the end. By default determined based on angle.

methods.name: create_s_hook
methods.signature: create_s_hook( length: float, model_angles: RotationAngles, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, concrete_cover_props: ConcreteCoverProperties, hook_length: float = 0, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create an S-hook shape with 180° hooks at both ends. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system, along the X-axis.
methods.remarks: Create an S-hook shape with 180° hooks at both ends. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system, along the X-axis.

params.name: length
params.doc: Length of the reference line

params.name: model_angles
params.doc: Angles to rotate the shape from local to global coordinate system.

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties.

params.name: concrete_cover_props
params.doc: Concrete covers. Relevant are: left and right cover.

params.name: hook_length
params.doc: Length of both hooks. Default value (0) calculates the length automatically.

methods.name: create_hook_stirrup
methods.signature: create_hook_stirrup( length: float, model_angles: RotationAngles, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, concrete_cover_props: ConcreteCoverProperties, hook_length: float = 0, hook_start_angle: float = 180.0, hook_end_angle: float = 180.0, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create a hook stirrup with user defined hooks at both ends. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system, along the X-axis.
methods.remarks: Create a hook stirrup with user defined hooks at both ends. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system, along the X-axis.

params.name: length
params.doc: Length of the reference line

params.name: model_angles
params.doc: Angles to rotate the shape from local to global coordinate system.

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties.

params.name: concrete_cover_props
params.doc: Concrete covers. Relevant are: left and right cover.

params.name: hook_length
params.doc: Length of both hooks. Default value (0) calculates the length automatically.

methods.name: create_spacer
methods.signature: create_spacer( length: float, width: float, height: float, model_angles: RotationAngles, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create a spacer shape. Created shape is 3-dimensional with total 5 legs. Concrete covers are not considered. Legs nr:
methods.remarks: Create a spacer shape. Created shape is 3-dimensional with total 5 legs. Concrete covers are not considered. Legs nr:

params.name: length
params.doc: Length of the box bounding the shape (X-direction).

params.name: width
params.doc: Width of the box bounding the shape (Y-direction).

params.name: height
params.doc: Height of the box bounding the shape (Z-direction).

params.name: model_angles
params.doc: Angles to rotate the shape from local to global coordinate system.

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties.

methods.name: create_u_link
methods.signature: create_u_link( width: float, side_length: float, model_angles: RotationAngles, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, concrete_cover_props: ConcreteCoverProperties, hook_length: float, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create a U-bar with both left and right legs of the same length. Optionally with hooks at both ends. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system, with its open side pointing upwards (in Y+ direction) like in the letter U.
methods.remarks: Create a U-bar with both left and right legs of the same length. Optionally with hooks at both ends. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system, with its open side pointing upwards (in Y+ direction) like in the letter U.

params.name: width
params.doc: Width of the U-bar base line.

params.name: side_length
params.doc: Length of both left and right leg.

params.name: model_angles
params.doc: Angles to rotate the shape from local to global coordinate system.

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties.

params.name: concrete_cover_props
params.doc: Concrete covers. Relevant are: left, right and bottom cover.

params.name: hook_length
params.doc: Length of both hooks. When set to 0, it's calculated automatically. When set to -1, no hooks are created.

returns.doc: Bar shape of the u link shape in world coordinates

methods.name: create_u_link_variable
methods.signature: create_u_link_variable( width: float, side_length_start: float, side_length_end: float, model_angles: RotationAngles, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, concrete_cover_props: ConcreteCoverProperties, start_hook: float = 0.0, end_hook: float = 0.0, start_hook_angle: float = 90.0, end_hook_angle: float = 90.0, hook_type_start: HookType | int = -1, hook_type_end: HookType | int = -1, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create an u-bar with different lengths of the left and right leg. Optionally with hooks at the end of right and/or left leg. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system, with its open side pointing upwards (in Y+ direction) like in the letter U.
methods.remarks: Create an u-bar with different lengths of the left and right leg. Optionally with hooks at the end of right and/or left leg. The shape is created in local XY coordinate system, with its open side pointing upwards (in Y+ direction) like in the letter U.

params.name: width
params.doc: Width of the U-bar base line.

params.name: side_length_start
params.doc: Length of the left leg.

params.name: side_length_end
params.doc: Length of the right leg.

params.name: model_angles
params.doc: Angles to rotate the shape from local to global coordinate system.

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties.

params.name: concrete_cover_props
params.doc: Concrete covers. Relevant are: left, right and bottom cover.

params.name: start_hook
params.doc: Length of the hook at the end of the left leg. When set to 0, it's calculated automatically. When set to -1, hook is not created.

params.name: end_hook
params.doc: Length of the hook at the end of the right leg. When set to 0, it's calculated automatically. When set to -1, hook is not created.

params.name: start_hook_angle
params.doc: Angle of the hook of the left leg [-180, 180].

params.name: end_hook_angle
params.doc: Angle of the hook of the right leg [-180, 180].

params.name: hook_type_start
params.doc: Type of the hook of the left leg. By default determined based on angle.

params.name: hook_type_end
params.doc: Type of the hook of the right leg. By default determined based on angle.

methods.name: create_freeform_shape_with_hooks
methods.signature: create_freeform_shape_with_hooks( points: Point2DList | Point3DList | list[Point2D] | list[Point3D], model_angles: RotationAngles, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, concrete_cover: float, start_hook: float = 0, end_hook: float = 0, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create a free form shape based on points. Optionally with standard 90° hooks at start and/or end of the shape.
methods.remarks: Create a free form shape based on points. Optionally with standard 90° hooks at start and/or end of the shape.

params.name: points
params.doc: Points of the geometry side (min. 2 points)

params.name: model_angles
params.doc: Angles to rotate the shape from local to global coordinate system.

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties.

params.name: concrete_cover
params.doc: Concrete cover. Will be applied on all sides.

params.name: start_hook
params.doc: Length of the hook at the start. Default value (0) calculates the length automatically. If set to -1: no hook.

params.name: end_hook
params.doc: Length of the hook at the end. Default value (0) calculates the length automatically. If set to -1: no hook.

methods.name: create_circle_stirrup_with_user_hooks
methods.signature: create_circle_stirrup_with_user_hooks( radius: float, model_angles: RotationAngles, shape_props: ReinforcementShapeProperties, concrete_cover: float, overlap: float, hook_length_start: float, hook_angle_start: float, hook_length_end: float, hook_angle_end: float, ) -> BendingShape
methods.summary: Create a circle stirrup shape. If rotation angles all set to 0, the shape is created in local XY coordinate system. The center of the reference circle is the (0,0) point.
methods.remarks: Create a circle stirrup shape. If rotation angles all set to 0, the shape is created in local XY coordinate system. The center of the reference circle is the (0,0) point.

params.name: radius
params.doc: Radius of the reference circle.

params.name: model_angles
params.doc: Angles to rotate the shape from local to global coordinate system.

params.name: shape_props
params.doc: Shape properties.

params.name: concrete_cover
params.doc: Concrete cover.

params.name: overlap
params.doc: Overlap length.

params.name: hook_length_start
params.doc: Length of the hook at the start. When set to 0, the length will be calculated automatically.

params.name: hook_angle_start
params.doc: Hook angle at the start. When set to 0, it will be calculated automatically.

params.name: hook_length_end
params.doc: Length of the hook at the end. When set to 0, the length will be calculated automatically.

params.name: hook_angle_end
params.doc: Hook angle at the end. When set to 0, it will be calculated automatically.
